parameters.query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS glpi_desligamentos (glpi_ticket_id INT PRIMARY KEY, colaborador_nome VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, tipo VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Demissao', ativos_atualizados INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, processado_em DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4
SELECT id, service_tag, equipment_type, model, employee_name FROM assets WHERE status = 'IN_USE' AND deleted_at IS NULL AND employee_name IS NOT NULL AND employee_name != ''
UPDATE assets SET status = 'STOCK', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN ({{ $json.matchedIdsSql }}) AND status = 'IN_USE'

INSERT IGNORE INTO glpi_desligamentos (glpi_ticket_id, colaborador_nome, tipo, ativos_atualizados) VALUES ({{ $json.ticketId }}, '{{ $json.nome.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.tipo }}', {{ $json.totalAtivos }})

parameters.rawBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ path: '/ITILFollowup', method: 'POST', headers: { 'Session-Token': $json.sessionToken }, body: { input: { items_id: $json.ticketId, itemtype: 'Ticket', content: $json.nota, is_private: 0 } } }) }}
